entry.title: Re: 3E Implementation
entry.content:
Hello

if you have a 3E license you will get a huge list of documents of many kind (admin installaiotn, FAQ  etc.) How to use the 3E content.

This is true for e.g. phrases, content, rule sets, wwi layouts/Generation variant

If you strictly follow this documentation you can do a 3E installation

So use the full capacity of the 3E license: the business should use OCC tool to load the data provided by 3E

C.B.

entry.title: Re: SVT PROD Scenario
entry.content:
Hello

the "PRO" and the "CON" scenario are the most complex one in SVT. I could write books on the topics as learned in using SVT for production, and any day a new learning will come.

You will find much more pitfalls (believe me) in analysing SVT results for production: But i will not explain them.. this is a booklet of may be of roughly 10 pages to write down all the lessons learned the last years

C.B.

PS: The consulting note on SVT is for "PRO" scenario to be improved. The explanation shown there is not good in daily practise. BUT IT IS THE BEST WHAT WE HAVE

entry.title: Re: Commerce Cloud: OCC V2 stateless (for Spartacus) with...
entry.content:
Hi @juliancookie 

Are you trying to implement SOM (LORD with SAP R3) on CCV2 (SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud)? If so, you've likely hit a dead end.

Synchronous Order Management (SOM and the LORD APIs) are not supported on SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud.

See Synchronous Order Management Module | SAP Help Portal

If you are doing this with SAP Commerce (not CCV2), do note that the EOMM (end of mainstream maintenance) of SAP Commerce (not CCV2) is July 31st, 2026 (as of this posting) - Supported Releases | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: "Notification of Key Technical Updates" - Page Not Found - CCV2 Java 21/Spring 6 Upgrade
entry.content:
The link to "Notification of Key Technical Updates" (available at https://help.sap.com/whats-new/79f24c67f70645bfaf5ae95df7813e72?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION ) relating to the 2025/2026 SAP Commerce Cloud upgrade from Java 17/Spring 5.x to Java 21/Spring 6.x results in multiple redirects and a "Page Not Found".

Does this page exist, or has it not been made public yet?

entry.title: Re: How to implement soft state in RAP ODATA Service
entry.content: why you need the soft state?

entry.title: Disable automatic subscription create - CAPM
entry.content:
I am using SAP Event mesh in my cap application. I observed that the application takes care of creating subscriptions in the queue when it encounters the .on method of the messaging instance. 

Is there any options to disable it ? I will take care of queue subscriptions.

entry.title: New Book: Enterprise Architecture with SAP (SAP-PRESS)
entry.content:
Today, SAP-PRESS has released the book "Enterprise Architecture with SAP".
The book is very comprehensive of the topic, with 18 Chapters!

Coupon code EASAPCOMMUNITY for 15% off.
Happy learning !! 😊😊

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Tim Koster - November 2024 Edition
entry.content: Thanks so much for the interview! Was a great pleasure to talk to you @sveabecker !!

entry.title: How Ariba Sourcing Licensing works ?
entry.content:
Dear All, 

just wanted to understand the Licensing of Ariba, 

as per my understanding the Licensing should be on Concurrent number of users e.g. If i have 10 user licenses , only 10 users can login to Ariba Sourcing at any time however I have any number of users  created  in system. is that correct ?

second is say i have 10 employees /Users who will perform actual Ariba sourcing task .. but I do have IT support team (say 5 more IT resources ) 

do these 5 IT resources will consume the License ? in reality none of these IT resource will work on the system and will only work on either Incident or on Enhancement request.

Appreciate your valuable comment on the above .

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for international trade vs SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content: Derrick - Unfortunately, I don't think there is a place in MM to see the codes anymore. With S4 they have been moved. We have tried this as well and SAP's response was, in Standard SAP Public Cloud, you will not be able to see these.

entry.title: Error During User Provisioning with IPS to Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have provisioned the users from Azure to IAS and then to Enable Now. When I delete a user in IAS or in Azure (e.g., in the source system), the user is also deleted in the target system (Enable Now) through a provisioning job. However, when I try to provision the same user again in Enable Now, I get the following error:

user: f200d114-dfbe-4da4-942e-f93c3d0c18ef, system: Target Enable Now, time: 2024-11-21T13:09:06.302+00, error: HTTP operation failed invoking https://tenant-enable-now/scim/v2/Users with statusCode: 400, Response: {  "status" : "400",  "scimType" : "uniqueness",  "schemas" : [ "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error" ],   "detail" : "userUuid is or was already assigned" }, content: {  "active": true,   "emails": [{"value": "enable@mail.com"}],   "name": {"familyName": "enable", "givenName": "enable"},   "schemas": [     "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User",     "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User"   ],  "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User": {     "userUuid": "f200d114-dfbe-4da4-942e-f93c3d0c18ef"   },  "userName": "enable@mail.com" }

When I change, for example, the email address of a user in Azure or IAS (Source System) and provision the user to Enable Now, I get the following error:

user:U_8934VDGDIU9698CJAH7KJSKS, system=Targer Enable Now,  time=2024-11-21T1,  error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://tenant-enable-nowp/scim/v2/Users/U_8934VDGDIU9698CJAH7KJSKS with statusCode: 400, Response: {   "status" : "400",   "scimType" : "mutability",   "schemas" : [ "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error" ],  

"detail" : "User auth_name is immutable" }, content={"active":true,"emails":[{"value":"enable2@mail.com"}],"id":"U_8934VDGDIU9698CJAH7KJSKS","name":{"familyName":"enable3","givenName":"enable2"},"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User","urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User"],"urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User" :{"userUuid":"3dsfg45-sdsg45-d-9ff45176-sff4ycycv"},"userName":"enable3@mail.com"}

How can I provision the deleted users again to the Target System? How can I update the changed user attributes, such as the user email, in Enable Now with a provisioning job?


Many Thanks

Best Regards










​

entry.title: Component (RM) qty not proportionate with PROCESS ORDER quantity
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

User created a PROCESS ORDER in S4, changed the process order qty in COR2 and saw that the components quantity also changed proportionately based on BOM.

But another Order for same FG Material, User changed the process order qty in PPDS Planning board /SAPAPO/CDPS0 Txn with option "Adjust Proportionately", but the Qty (UoM - PC) is not proportionate for the RM component. There is +/- 1 or 2 units difference for the RM. In this case expected value is 8. There is no Component scrap % as well.

Why is it behaving so? Maybe since PPDS process the info from Live cache?

Looking for your inputs pls.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: SuccessFactors Fit to standard workshops
entry.content:
Hi

  I have a question on Fit to Standard workshops for SuccessFactors implementation. Most of the materials available are for S/4 HANA and not for SuccessFactors.

My questions are below,

1. At which phase do we do fit to standard workshop 

2. As per documents we need to use cloud ALM to do fit to standard workshop and capture requirements in Cloud ALM

3. If we capture requirements in Cloud ALM during explore phase then when to do we discuss and capture configuration workbooks for each modules.

4. Do we have any video explaining on how to conduct fit to standard workshop for SucccessFactors which the partner have access to.

5. Do we have a fit to standard workshop schedule for SuccessFactors Modules?

Please help in understanding this better.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Re: Change data access language in a story
entry.content: for me it doesn't change.

Hi community

I'm using cl_salv_table  and I need to show all the content of a field with 200 characters, but it is not displaying everything:

After the letter 'R' there is more data to be displayed but they are not being displayed

please see attached code

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08 Released – Safeguarding Customer Investments and Maximizing Value
entry.content:
Stefan,

Thank you for posting. Great updates in SPS 08. I particularly appreciate the NSE automations and all the partitioning options. This allows for the SAP HANA Database Platform to get closer to a truly automated data temperature persistency layer. Great progress from the early days!

I also appreciate the ability to limit connections via Client IP. Nice mechanism for those unruly clients!

Scott

entry.title: How to set default value for parameter of action bound to multiple instances(Collection) in CAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm using CAP(Node.js) with odata(v4) & fiori elements. I've a composition between two entities, lets call them parent and child. They are displayed on the UI such that on the object page of parent entity i have displayed the child entity in the form of Line Items .I have created an action bound with the child entity and it takes an input parameter with a default value, the default value is a field from the parent Entity using the annotation 

@UI.ParameterDefaultValue: in.parentEntity.field. But my requirement is that this action button has to be available/clickable even without selecting a record from the child entity so i had to make it a static action using the 'many' keyword i.e. An action bound to multiple instances of the entity rather that a single instance that has been selected, the old way of doing this was using the annotaion @CDS.odata.bindingparameter.collection.
 
Now the problem with binding it with multiple instances of the entity is that it doesn't let you give the default value for it's parameter using @ui.ParameterDefaultValue: in.parentEntity.field  because now it doesn't know which instance to take the value from.
 
One workaround i found for this problem was that i binded the action to the parent entity & placed the button at top the object page of parent entity. Now it can easily get the default value i.e.  @ui.ParameterDefaultValue: in.field & be available at all times. But the requirement is to show the button on the toolbar of child entity's table(where the create & delete buttons are) & it seems that using fiori elements you can only put the action button there if its bounded to the same entity.
 
So is there a way to: (a)Give default value as a parameter for action bound to multiple instances of an entity ? OR (b)Somehow move the action button from top of parent's object page down to the toolbar of its child table while still being bound to the parent entity ?

entry.title: Decentralized EWM : Enable XPS(Shipping solution from SCT)
entry.content:
Hi,

We are deploying EWM decentralized solution to a customer. In this process we are deliberating whether to enable XPS solution on EWM box or ECC box.

Could you please share your expertise on best system to enable XPS solution.

Thanks a Ton in Advance!!

Regards,

Bhanu

entry.title: SAP Data retrieval inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I recently encountered a discrepancy in data I retrieved with two methods on SAP Netweaver:
1) SE16 transaction and 2) RFC_READ_TABLE function

The RFC_READ_TABLE missed some of the rows which SE16 showed. There were no filters used, no truncation, and the data requested was just the BELNR column of the BSEG table. The same client was used to authorize the retrieval. Anyone knows what could be a cause as to why some rows are not extracted via RFC_READ_TABLE?

Thank you!

Niko

entry.title: error
Re: Payment Medium Formats Country Chile - S/4Hana Public
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.
The payment forms for banks are not localized for Chile, but you can find information on creating format mappings on the SAP Help Portal, in Map Format Data for Payments.

Kind regards,
Maite Bohn

entry.title: sysprocesses memusage column
entry.content: Hi. I'm using SAP ASE 16 SP04. In the sysprocesses table we have column memusage. Is the value in this column cumulative since the database session was created or is it for the last command processed by that session?

entry.title: Re: show all content in the ALV field
entry.content: 128 characters displayed maximum. Question already asked and answered with workarounds (but anyway it's maximum 128 characters).

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings
entry.content:
Hi, All,

I have followed the instructions in this link Establishing Connection from Cloud Edition to Business System (Electronic Documents Only) | SAP Help Portal to establish the connection from DRCCE back to SAP Business system, which is required for Malaysia. We followed all the steps and created the destination in the sub-account and verified it could connect to our SAP Business sytem, then went to "Manage Destination Mapping", the "Create" button is still greyed out as if the destination is not there. Is anybody else facing this issue?

And when trying to open a ticket with SAP, I couldn't find our DRCCE systems in the list. Fortunately we also have Integration Suite, so I used that. A lot of fields are hard to fill out because DRCCE is not the same as integration suite. Has anybody opened a ticket with SAP for DRCCE issue?

Thanks!
Kevin

entry.title: Re: SAP Data retrieval inconsistency
entry.content: RFC_READ_TABLE is not official, security concerns, it's very limited (truncations, etc.) Many workarounds have been discussed in the forum (e.g. not using RFC_READ_TABLE).

entry.title: Activation Error - Calculation View by Table User Defined Function
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a User defined table function in HANA Calculation view and i am getting the below Activation error message, I tried making all the source fields to upper case but still getting the same error. Appreciate any inputs.

 

Thanks,

Rajesh

entry.title: ITS EWM_MOBGUI VS Custom ITS service
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While deploying the ITS service of the RF gun, I found few problem and like you opinion on this.

1. Is there any hardware prerequisites for custom ITS service (HTML code generation and publish ) and EWM_MOBGUI (Standard WEB_GUI for HTML) ? I am asking this because the EWM_MOBGUI does not work on our Windows based RF gun.

2. Why the login page ( checked in Google chrome and android RF gun) is different for Development system and quality system, is there and config for that ?

3. Does EWM_MOBGUI webservice work on windows based RF gun ? Currently the screen is blank. where as when we used custom ITS service I was able to navigate in the screen.

Thank you in advance. 

UI WebGUI and Internet Transaction Server (ITS), EWM - Radio Frequency

entry.title: Re: Hello. We are having issues getting SAP Companion ena...
entry.content:
Hi Susan,

In the SAP Companion configuration settings the Plugin Server setting will always be set to  https://webassistant.enable-now.cloud.sap/.

Parameters are used to modify the behaviour of SAP Companion and there are about 50 of these that can be set but do not need to be set, depending on how you want SAP Companion to behave.  For example, you can use Parameters to modify the branding of SAP Companion but you may be happy to leave it as is. 

The place to get documentation about the available SAP Companion Parameters is the SAP Companion Integration Guide.  After opening the Guide, look in the Features and Configuration, Content Languages and Translation, and SAP Companion Reporting sections, as a good starting point.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to send HTTP Body parameters in SAP PO 7.5
entry.content: Hi, did you ever manage to get this working? I am struggling with exact same issue

entry.title: Re: Issue with long running PAL Function on HANA
entry.content: Glad this issue could be resolved quickly! Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Product type in S4 Cloud and Subscription Billing system
entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

based on a quick (but far from complete) analysis, there are currently no hard-coded restrictions known of some downstream processes that exclusively work with SBPD. But it can't be taken for granted, that some specific funcionality will be introduced at any time. 
Additionall there's some special logic for service materials, that would get applicable that never have been tested E2E. 

What I would take as a conclusion: It might work. And if it is important for you, you might try out.
But it's clearly not a recommended or supported variant as of today.

May I ask what you concrete use case is, why you want subscriptions based on service products?
Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Automate your core Master Data creation processes with SAP MDG cloud edition and Derivations
entry.content:
Hi,

Some great news for the SAP BTP SAAS service “SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition“! As officially announced on this page What's New Viewer - SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition:

SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition now supports DQM Derivation Scenarios.

Many MDG experts already know this capability from the SAP MDG Private Cloud Edition and know the strength of this feature.

 

Introduction

SAP has now released the following Fiori Apps in SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition in that space:

  1. Define Derivation Scenarios for Business Partners
  2. Import Derivation Scenarios and Export Derivation Scenarios

With the app “Define Derivation Scenarios for Business Partners” you can now implement (no code) business rules to derive business partner data automatically in a background step of a MDG process. The following SAP standard process templates include the “derive step”:

  • SAP_BP_COA SAP: Consolidate BP Automated
  • SAP_BP_MA SAP: Mass Processing BP Automated
  • SAP_BX_COA SAP: Consolidate BP+Rel. Automated
  • SAP_BX_SA SAP: Single Processing BP Automated
  • SAP_BX_DCA SAP: Decentr.Create BP+Rel.w/Mtchg Autom
  • SAP_BX_DUA SAP: Decentr. Update BP+Rel. Autom.

Before: Process without derivations

Business example without derivations:

 

Step 1: Before the automation was defined the business end users used MDG cloud edition to create new Business Partner manually.

Step 2: Automation - In the past the end users had the chance to derived BP data like Name, Tax Number and Address data from an external repository like CDQ. That automation already increased the process performance and optimized the data quality

Step 3-6: Manual activities - After that step the end users had to manually create some more BP data like BP-Roles, assignment to Industry sectors and company codes and organizational data (Sales Area for the customer part and purchasing data for suppliers)

Step 7: Finally the end user can submit the request.

Summary: The whole process took a reasonable amount of time and was pretty error-prone because sometimes the end users forgot to assign some entities.

After: Process with MDG Derivations:

Same result as above but with derivations:

 

Step 1: Business end users uses MDG cloud edition to trigger a new creation process for a Business Partner.

Step 2: Automation - As before: MDG cloud edition is doing a lookup of BP data like Name, Tax Number and Address data from an external repository.

Step 3: Submit request – End user doesn’t have to enter more master data attributes because they will be derived in the next step

Step 4: Automation – The MDG Process will execute the derivation scenario. By this the business rules are applied within seconds and no user input required.

Summary: The new process with derivation will decrease the time to create new master data and in addition in a higher data quality.

Scenario Details

Screenshots from the design time app “Define Derivation Scenarios for Business Partners”

1. MDG Derivation Scenario level

Comments:

  • In Derivation Rules for Fields: Derive single values for attributes on level BUT000
  • Derivation Rules for Tables: The scenario will derive (create new table lines) for various tables like BUT100, BUT0IS, MDC_KNVV, MDC_KNB1, MDC_LFB1 and MDC_LFM1
  • For each of the tables a rule is created.
  • Each of the rule can be managed/governed individually by an status based process.

2. Details for the derivation rule “Derive Industries for Organizations”

 

Comments:

  • Condition Fields (eg BUT000-TYPE) can be used to define additional conditions on rule level. In this example you can define different rules for different conditions. An example is that an BP of type Person gets different Industry Sectors (or no?) assigned compared to organizations.
  • Result Fields are the attributes which are derived by the system according to the decision table (see next screenshot)

3. Details for the BRF+ Decision table for Industries

Here you can review how to define the business rule without coding in BRF+

 

If the BP is of type Organization, the system will derive 2 new Industries for it. No ABAP coding with MDG API required. In a SAAS solution BADI coding option is not available anyways.

4. Details for the BRF+ Decision table for Company Codes

Comment:

The column 1 "Condition Decision Table for TABLE" is maintained in the "Condition table" to have more flexibility. In this example "DUMMY"  means that for all BPs (executed in the process and within the scenario condition expression) the two Company Codes entries will be derived. Since newer version of DQM Derivation Scenarios this DUMMY is not need anymore. 

Screenshots of the new process with derivations

1. Start the creation process

 

Comments:

  • With this app you can create a new BP from scratch, or you use the “Look Up and Create” feature.
  • You can also search for existing BPs and send them into a change process.

 

2. Retrieve the lookup data from external data provider

 

Comments:

  • See help: https://help.sap.com/docs/mdg-ce/administration-guide/integrating-reference-data-for-business-partners
  • You do a search on the data provider within the MDG UI and select the correct BP in the list. By using the “Create Business Partner” button the data will get copied to your request form. It will take over all the data from the provider like address, organizational names, Tax and ID Number.

3. Submit the request

 

Comments:

  • The end user can leave the entities for Industries, BP-Roles and organizational data empty because the system will derive the data after the submit.

 

4. Review the automatic derivation

This is the UI Inbox task as presented to the approver:

 

Comments:

  • The derivations have been successfully executed and the system defaulted the values for Organizational information. Also the BP-Roles are derived.

This is a screenshot of the derivation step in the “Manage Governance Processes” App:

 

Comments:

  • You can see that the derivation affected 7 tables.
  • The green color identifies that new rows have been added. For BP-Roles you can see that 4 new rows (BP-Roles) have been added.
  • In this app you can do further drills downs to see all the details for the derivations.

 

5. Check the record created by process after automation.

The following huge screenshot highlight in red all the data which have been derived by derivation and in green the derived values from the data provider look up. In this example process the system was able to derive >95% of the data without any end user input.

 

Next steps for you

If you are interested in this feature I recommend checking the following documentation:

  • What's New Viewer - SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition - Help
  • SAP Master Data Governance - Community
  • SAP MDG How To Guides
  • Blog from @Sabine_Stellma https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/automate-your-master-data-process-with-derivation-scenarios-in-sap-master/ba-p/13538990

With the updates on Q4/2024 for the SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition the SAAS solution got some more interesting features. Please read this What's New Viewer - SAP Master Data Governance, Cloud Edition

You can also test MDG cloud edition as a FREE TIER: Follow this guide to get you hands onto MDG cloud edition.

Cheers
Steffen

++ Many thanks for reviewing the content of this blog to @Sabine_Stellma and @Mark63  ++

Video of the end user process: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_yhdkgjr2

entry.title: IBP Master Data Types available in Master Data Workbooks
entry.content:
Our backend was just upgraded to 2411 and we are using the 2408 Excel Add-in. It seems that since the backend was upgraded, some master data types are no longer listed in the Master Data Workbook. I can not find anything in the notes that would explain this situation. 

Does someone know why this may have happened?

entry.title: Re: Fair Share in aATP
entry.content: hi, Did you find any way to do fair share?

entry.title: DeepEntity or ChangeSet question
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if there is a way to do the following OData Calls scenario.

I have a Parent Header Entity with 3 Childs (Items, Conditions, Texts).

In my flow during acquisition of an Order, before saving the Order, the user can simulate Price Conditions with a Button.

In this phase, I need to call Backend sending Header and Items data inserted from the user.

The backend with Header and Items Data shoud send back calculated Price Conditions(1..*), Gift Items(1..*), Automatic Texts(1..*).

There is a way to do this without save any information on Backend ?

I tried to use ChangeSet but, I do not receive any response (similar problem explained in this question: SAP MDK Changeset Response). Furthermore, as explained, I can't read the data after ChangeSet call because the data was not saved in the Backend in this phase.

I tried also to check the way to use DeepEntity calls but I do not understand how to do all the calls, send Header and Items, and receive Conditions, Items and texts, like explained above.

I would like to avoid saving local information in the Backend that I have to read after the request calls.

Any suggestion ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: My CDS view self study tutorial - Part 6 consume table function in CDS view

Thanks,

Rory

entry.title: Re: Accelerated Return Reason Code and Good movement type 343 movement type reason code mandatory (B
entry.content:

    You cannot change any settings of standard delivered movement types via this Configuration Step.

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional data replication with SDI
entry.content: Why you want to replicate the same table? If both system will update the system table and you would like to sync the information, then you might see data inconsistence.Usually SDI replication is used to sync the data between different systems.

entry.title: Accounting for a business Partner in TPM44
entry.content:
Hola expertos,

En el TCODE TPM44, ¿es posible registrar la contabilidad a un BP (Business Partner)?

entry.title: Re: How to implement soft state in RAP ODATA Service
entry.content: Due to customer requirements, we need a mechanism to extract data from legacy ABAP reports using the SUBMIT statement and send it to the client. However, as the volume of data to be extracted is too large, we aim to implement a solution to optimize performance. Upon the initial request, approximately 10,000 records will be cached, and the total count will be set. Subsequently, data will be divided based on the skip and top parameters, retrieving only the required portion from the cached data to enable server-side paging and improve speed. This method has demonstrated adequate performance in some cases when using SEGW-based legacy OData, and we would like to implement the same approach in RAP for similar needs.

entry.title: Re: ARBCIG_CHANGEDoc table is showing Vendor change as Ve...
entry.content:
Hi...

Check in SWEC:

KRED    ARBCIGLFA1   VENDORDELETE

The flag must be in 'On Delete' colunm.

 

 

 

 

Best regards,

Carina.

entry.title: SAP Preferred Success: 2502 Release Planning Sessions
entry.content:
√   Do you want to know what is the 2502 release plan?
√   Do you want to know what actions you need to take in 2502 release?
√   Do you want to know what happens during the release upgrade weekend?
√   Do you want to know if there is any sessions or resources from SAP to support you with 2502 release?
√   Do you want to know what you can get from SAP Preferred Success Services to support you with 2502 release?

If you have answered “Yes” to any of these questions, we invite you to join sessions by Preferred Success Product Management team on "2502 Release Planning Sessions for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition"

*An SAP Preferred Success subscription is required to register and attend these sessions. Before registering for an SAP Preferred Success webinar, a one-time registration is required Register for the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Preferred Success. Learn more about SAP Preferred Success here.

We look forward to helping you in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud journey. Feel free to write us at s4hana_cloud_adoption@sap.com

Visit SAP Preferred Success Release Center for more information. Follow SAP Community to learn more about SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.

entry.title: BTP Trial ABAP environment - Error service instance
entry.content:
Hello,

I received this error today when I tried to create the service instance.
Can someone help me?

entry.title: Configuration Changes to Enable Advanced Search by Default in Backoffice
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have conducted multiple Hybris version upgrades for our application. In earlier versions, the backoffice layout integrated the Search area, List View, and Editor Area into a single layout, with the advanced search feature always enabled.

However, following recent upgrades, each section now has an expandable and collapsible option, setting the simple search as the default mode. To access the advanced search, users need to click on the advancedSearch icon.

Recently, the customer has requested that the advanced search widget be enabled by default. In response, we attempted to disable the simple search for specific types (e.g., Product), which successfully enabled the advanced search by default. However, this change resulted in the complete absence of the simple search bar.

We would like to explore if there is a possibility to make the advanced search available by default without removing the simple search option. Could you please advise on the necessary configuration changes to achieve this?

Thank you for your assistance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Configuration Changes to Enable Advanced Search by De...
entry.content:
With the OOTB features in the Advanced Search Widget, changing the setting of "displayInNonCollapsibleContainer" from "false" to "true" can be helpful.

For detailed steps, please refer to KBA 3543726 - How to Enable Advanced Search by Default in Backoffice - SAP Commerce Cloud

entry.title: Valuation type of material ignored during STO (ITSAP-1143)
entry.content:
According to the note 1860315  (Error in P101 price when creating STO / valuation type not used / stock type?), there is no standard solution for using valuation type for material price determination. As the solution you suggest the modification in the LV61AA46 / XKOMV_KBETR_ERMITTELN. 

 

Which option do we have for this development in S4Hana cloud version? Currently, valuation type of material is not working. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Valuation type of material ignored during STO (ITSAP-...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,
More details can be found from the blog below:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/china-tax-included-purchasing-price-with-chinese-translation/ba-p/12836206

entry.title: Re: My CDS view self study tutorial - Part 6 consume table function in CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" With keyword [with parameters], the client parameters is defined which works as the importing parameters for the ABAP class method zcl_amdp_bp_detail=>crmd_partner_but000. The keywords "returns" defines available fields which could be consumed by other CDS entities. "

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

Regards,

🙂

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Error CVIS_UI_GENERIC 011 while creating a BP
entry.content: Hello, As mentioned in the error, contact person needs to be maintained. If the contact person is set as required then it is necessary to maintain a contact person (incl. all required fields, e.g. name, …). Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: CIM External Tax System ID required during company code master data upload via csv file

entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: Individual number enquiry

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Group reporting 2023, icmr, wsl amount
entry.content:
Hi @MD92,

Please find the delivered data source with scope item 1SG ICMR for group reporting (and 40Y for ICMR for accounting) in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/c9027ed077454271a7dd6d1b7b4b542b.html?version=2023.002.

The detailed configuration delivered with the scope items can be found in attachments of https://me.sap.com/notes/2965516. If you don't get the content by installing 1SG, you can also create your own data sources based on CDS view ICA_CONSJOURNALENTRIES_4 (joining ACDOCU and ACDOCA) in ICADS.

Plus note the WSL use in Group reporting: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/c9027ed077454271a7dd6d1b7b4b542b.html?version=2023.002#tsl-versus-wsl

Hope it helps.

Thanks!

Grace

entry.title: Issue while uploading S4 HANA Database to Maintenance planner
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We are having an issue while uploading S4 HANA Databases to the Maintenance Planner via SAP portal.

 

The error message is: "System <SID> (HANADB) was created manually in LMDB and cannot be uploaded" and "An exception of type CX_SISE_EXCEPTION has occurred".

 

This issue persists despite the product version being shown automatically supplied.

 

We attempted to resolve it by removing the system from LMDB and re-synchronizing with the System Landscape Directory (SLD), but the error continues.

 

We seek assistance for resolving this issue.

 

Thanks & Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue while uploading S4 HANA Database to Maintenance...
entry.content:
Hello ,

Could you please check Note 2612026 to know about the meaning of the error message?
##2612026 - SAP HANA Database cannot be uploaded manually (Error message: "System was created manually in LMDB...")

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment - Release 2411
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" 

  • Triggering Where-Used List for Usages of CDS Annotation to enable the investigation in which ABAP CDS an annotation is used
  • Displaying Field Characteristics for RAP Types in the Element Information Popup, The Element Information popup (F2) for RAP types shows additional field characteristics information such as mandatory:create, mandatory:execute or readonly (details)
  • Multi-Dimensional Analysis App Generator, you can now use the multi-dimensional analysis app generator wizard to create all ABAP development objects that are needed to build, expose, and deploy a multi-dimensional analysis Fiori app (details) "

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: OData service not active in higher system on S4 Hana...
entry.content:
this is because the odata in on-prem only can be exposed from data binding only for test purposes as sap documentation says..

The publication should be done by the using /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE like for any other oData

Regards!

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content: Is Delta capture enabled for the Local table? How does the delta mechanism work in the delta table (tableXYZ_delta)?

entry.title: RWMB
entry.content: I didn't switch to EDIT more when I started T-code RMWB. I tried to change inside RWMB to edit mode with the personalized icon (screen attached) but didn't work. Can some share the knowledge on how to change the display mode to Edit/Change mode in Recipe Management? Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: How to Identify CDS Views as Alternatives to Classic Extractors for SAP Datasphere Integration
entry.content:
Dear Datasphere Experts

I’m currently working on integrating SAP S/4HANA with SAP Datasphere using ODP, as recommended by SAP. I understand that instead of the classic extractors (e.g., 2LIS_11_VAHDR, 0FI_GL_4), it’s now best practice to leverage CDS views.

Could someone guide me on how to:

Identify the relevant CDS views that correspond to these classic extractors?
Validate if these CDS views are ODP-enabled for extraction to SAP Datasphere?
Handle cases where no direct CDS view is available for a classic extractor?
Any tips, examples, or SAP resources (e.g., notes, documentation) would be greatly appreciated, especially for the specific examples like 2LIS_11_VAHDR and 0FI_GL_4.

Thank you for your insights

Priyanka

entry.title: Integrating ECC with CPI Event Driven Architecture
entry.content:
While ECC systems might not have the same level of event mesh capabilities as newer platforms like S/4HANA, they can still be integrated with event-driven architectures through various methods: Here I present how a custom development can achieve the same.

ABAP: Custom ABAP code can be developed that will be trigger based on events generated on specific business actions within ECC. These events can then be sent to CPI as message queues. Further in CPI an iflow can receive the message and process it. Refer to the diagram that explains how a custom development can simulate the Event mesh.

 

We can discuss more like this.
Please join with me and Subscribe to me at :https://www.youtube.com/@venkateswarank_baroda

entry.title: MC46 INVCO: Analysis Of Slow-Moving Items - Filter By SLOC
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know of a way to filter or search individual SLOCs on Slow Moving Items or can you only run the report on can you only run it for every SLOC at the same time?

Thanks,

entry.title: OData authorization Error in Pulic Cloud
entry.content:

However, when I deploy the app from BAS to the Cloud environment and log in with a Business User, I encounter an error during queries: "You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV 0001, return code 4." Where can this authorization be configured? The full URL is:
https://my000000.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/A_ProductionOrderItem_2

entry.title: Hotfix for upload data feature allowing users to load data into Parent nodes
entry.content:
Hi,

The new upload data in Data Management (Modeler) is allowing users to upload numbers even for a parent node.

When users are allowed to load data into top level, it is leaving the system open to any data inputs. In our case, when a user uploads data at a parent node mistakenly, it messes up the numbers at those parents and higher nodes subsequently. This feature has to have some kind of enable/disable button or check mechanism to enable only leaf nodes be loaded into the system. We do not want to allow users to load data into parent nodes. 

Is there a way already in the system to restrict this. Can it be quickly hot fixed.

entry.title: Re: calculated measure does not work independently within the model
entry.content:
Hi community !

I have figured out the solution for this QA.

The issue can be resolved by setting the exception aggregation type and exception dimension in the calculated measure. You can find the details about how and why in this technology blog. I hope this will be helpful for you all.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/understanding-exception-aggregation-via-examples/ba-p/13316662

entry.title: Re: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content: i dont know how to declare these array fields in odata data model in Service with SAP Annotation

entry.title: CDS for Customer hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I was looking for any cds available for customer hierarchy, I found few in view browser, but they are not released, so we cant use them.

We have a requirement to fetch customer hierarchy details maintained in "manage customer hierarchy". Any idea, how can i get the cds for this?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: SOLMAN JAVAデータサプライヤの欠落
entry.content:
SAPインシデント担当者様

構築したSOLMAN JAVAインスタンスを管理対象システム設定し、LMDBに登録しました。
LMDBから技術システムJAVAの内容を確認したところ、データサプライヤ完全性チェックにて以下2項目のデータサプライヤが「不明」となっており赤信号です。

J2EEInstanceKernel
CentralServiceInstanceKernel

こちらの赤信号を緑信号に直したいです。調査いただけますでしょうか？
どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN JAVAデータサプライヤの欠落
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

欠缺しているデータサプライヤJ2EEInstanceKernelとCentralServiceInstanceKernelの情報は、sapstartsrvプロセスによって SLD または LMDB に送信されます。

KBA2537063に従って該当するインスタンス・サーバーでご実行ください。

ご不明な点等ございましたらお知らせください。

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: Warranty alert / pop-up on equipment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client has requirement to have an alert/pop-up if the maintenance order creation date is within the vendor warranty start and end dates under linked equipment master data.

In ECC it is a standard feature and in S4 HANA On Premise a found a note to activate it - 2608731 - Fiori EAM apps: Warranty check is not triggering

But, I could not find any information on how to get that check activated for "Create Maintenance Order" or "Change Maintenance Order" under S4 Public Cloud 

The BADI implementation "/PLMB/EX_SPI_APPL_ACCESS" mentioned in Note-2608731 for On-Premise edition is not available in S4 Cloud Edition.

Thanks in advance for your support,

Prateek

entry.title: Re: Display custom logic from abap program into cds view
entry.content:
Hi,

to put custom logic in a cds view you can use Custom entities for CDS. There you can specify a class which dos the data determination.

Kind Regards

Matt

entry.title: Re: EMIGALL Objects in Migration Cockpit
entry.content: Dear Claudia, this post was made a few years ago, what is the current status of migration objects IS-U in migration cockpit? When you speak about cloud you also mean private cloud in RISE? Thanks and kind regards, Benjamin

entry.title: Re: Hotfix for upload data feature allowing users to load data into Parent nodes
entry.content: To restrict data uploads to only leaf nodes in Data Management (Modeler), you can enable Data Locking in the model preferences. This feature prevents data changes at parent nodes, ensuring only leaf nodes can be modified. Enable Data Locking in the model preferences, set the default lock state, and configure the driving dimensions and data regions for the lock. This should help maintain data integrity and prevent accidental uploads to parent nodes.

entry.title: Re: PM/CS: Configurable Task List - Standard Process
entry.content: Regarding point 2.4, "Extras->View Selection" is not available in my clean system. I have tried to change the equipment view profile but do not see a screen related to configuration. Any hints?

entry.title: Re: Team View (second manager) on compensation worksheet
entry.content:
What hierarchy is configured? Have you populated the second manager hierarchy in the UDF/basic user data? In this I believe the filter 'Team View (Second Manager)' is referring to the custom compensation hierarchy as defined in the UDF/basic user file field SECOND_MANAGER.

Hope this helps.

Christian

entry.title: How to clear entries in Recon GL account?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As per query user want to change recon a/c B from A. B a/c have 35 entry how to clear. i need to clear this.

Please help me on this.

 

Regards,

Chetan Kamble

entry.title: IAS for External Learner and Onboardee
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have recently faced an issue that may have been emphasised due to the enforcement of using IAS for External Learners.

Summary
Our customer was looking to onboard one of their external learners (addressed as "User") via the onboarding process, and both platforms/applications (Learning and Onboarding) are connected to the same IAS. This user can then be authenticated when using email address but cannot log in.

Process
This user is an active external learner using SAP IAS for authentication, the profile was registered with the user's first name, last name and email address. When the onboarding process started, the customer admin provided the same information recorded in the external learning profile, including first name, last name, and user's email address. The email address then leads to a user sync error in IAS, noting a profile already exists with the same email address.

Cause (Potentially?)
This user's email address already exists in IAS, the user can pass the IAS authentication but cannot log in successfully, given the external learning profile uses "firstname.lastname" as username and the onboarding profile uses "potential employee ID" as username. So the user cannot access the portal for onboarding processes.

Temp Fix
We suggested a temporary fix by asking the customer to deactivate this user's external learning profile from LMS. IAS will then delete this user's profile on IAS and free up the email address. Then Onboarding can utilise the email address and allow the user to finish the onboarding process. Once the user is onboarded and created as an employee, the customer admin can merge the 2 learning profiles together and retain the learning history.

Thoughts
However, the customer shouldn't need a "workaround", such as using a different email address or deactivating one of the IAS user profiles. It is a normal and reasonable process for any business to recruit external learners to become a part of the organization. IAS should have gone through the business impacts when pushing for SAP IAS.

Furthermore, if any customers are using "External Learning", "Onboarding", as well as "Pre Day 1 Learning", it may create chaos. The customer admin may have to constantly activate/deactivate different user profiles in IAS to allow users to access different portals, and it will lead to a massive amount of manual work for the admins.

Has anyone faced the same issue before? Or predict this may happen in the near future? Please kindly share your thoughts! (A ticket has been raised with SAP and may be requested to raise an enhancement request....)

Thanks,
Sunny

entry.title: Re: Issue with GOS with image as attachment from fiori
entry.content: Hi, has an answer been provided to this? We are facing same issue. File gets attached but on opening in sap its corrupted

entry.title: Edit Purchase Requisition converted to a Purchase Order for additional PO Line Items
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am looking for advice around the link between the PR and the PO, with respect to Edits. In this scenario, let us say that the PR is a single line (Line 10) and has been converted to a PO. If a component was missed and needs to be added to the PO, the options are limited. With our configuration, if we edit Line 10 on the PO, this will go back through the approval workflow based on the linked PR. To add Line 20 to the PO:

- We either have the Edits unlocked which allows the addition of Line 20 to the PO which is automatically approved and does not flow through the approval workflow, or
- The link to the PR is maintained, and the addition of Line 20 is disallowed.

If the linked PR is edited in Manage PR Professional to add a Line 20:
- Will this flow through the approval workflow?
- Will this allow Line 20 to be added to the PO with the original PR and new Approval as the Reference PR?

Essentially I am looking to avoid creating a new PR/PO, and instead have the ability to edit the PO but still ensure the Approval workflow is maintained. Thanks!

entry.title: Email recipient of the PO form from ME23N from messages tab
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to fetch the email id of the recipient of the PO form from the message tab on the ME23N tcode. 

I don't want to fetch the email id from Vendor master as after triggering the email someone may change the vendor email id. Instead my requirement is to fetch the email id of the recipient to which email is already sent so that client is aware to which email id the PO form is sent. I need this data to be fetched on the custom report.

entry.title: How to display staging tables created by DMC in cloud?
entry.content: Is there a FIORI app/ method in FIORI to view the data in staging tables for different objects?

entry.title: Not possible to retrieve information about SAP Scripting usage from directly from SAP.
entry.content:
We want to get the list of users who are using SAP Scripts since it is enabled for all user it is not possible to identify the population users who are using the sap scripts in EP7 SAP system, provide us the solution to find it. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Not possible to retrieve information about SAP Script...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

It's not possible to know the detail users who called the sapscript.

But in Tcd:SP01 you can specify parameter "Document Category" 
as OTF,then execute,you will see all the OTF spools created by the users.
OTF spools were created by calling SAPSCRIPT form.

Pls let me know if you have any further questions.

Best Regards

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: special character and space not allowed in code values
entry.content: Hi Zhehui, Thanks for the update, we have proposed the same to business, but they want blank values in codelist which is not supported in the public cloud.

entry.title: Approval procedure For Cancelled AR Invoice
entry.content: Could you please guide me on how to configure an approval process that is triggered before posting when a user cancels an AR invoice in the system?
